data.title: AHF Urges WTO Members: Don’t Put Affordable Medicines at Risk
data.description: A call has been made by the AIDS Healthcare Foundation (AHF) in Los Angeles for governments convening in Yaoundé, Cameroon for the 14th Ministerial Conference of the World Trade Organization (WTO). They are advocating for the maintenance of the ongoing moratorium concerning specific intellectual property conflicts, termed as “non-violation complaints,” within the scope of the World Trade Organization’s Agreement on Trade-Related Aspects of Intellectual Property Rights (TRIPS). This protective measure has been instrumental in shielding nations from WTO disputes related to the utilization of TRIPS flexibilities.

data.title: Marugame Udon Opens New Location at Victoria Gardens in Rancho Cucamonga on April 2
data.description: A new dining option has been introduced at a prominent shopping location in Southern California, showcasing handcrafted Japanese udon and tempura. The renowned Marugame Udon has brought their unique culinary offerings to Rancho Cucamonga, starting from March 30, 2026. Visitors can now enjoy an exclusive addition to the menu at this acclaimed fast-casual restaurant, famous for its authentic Japanese cuisine. This expansion caters to the growing demand for diverse culinary experiences in the area.

data.title: Sherritt Announces Non‑Brokered Private Placement for up to $50 Million
data.description: In Toronto, Sherritt International Corporation disclosed a deal with both new and existing shareholders to conduct a non-brokered private placement of common shares (TSX:S). This initiative aims to generate up to $50 million in aggregate gross proceeds and is referred to as the "Private Placement." Notably, one of the participants in this Private Placement is Seymour Schulich, who, through a company under his control, has committed to subscribing to the offering.

data.title: Market outlook for 3/30: SPX, DXY, BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, ADA, HYPE. Fear in traders amid oil prices, US job data, and US-Israel-Iran tensions led to a decline in Bitcoin and altcoins.
data.description: Cryptocurrencies such as Bitcoin and alternative coins experienced a decline in value as trading began on Monday in the United States. This drop was influenced by concerns among traders regarding oil prices, US employment statistics, and the potential outcomes of the ongoing tensions between the US and Israel against Iran.

data.title: KORE Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
data.description: KORE Group Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: KORE) announced significant financial growth in 2025, showcasing strong profitability and an increase in Free Cash Flow. The company, recognized as a leading global player in the Internet of Things ("IoT") sector, demonstrated robust performance in delivering IoT Connectivity and Solutions to its clients. This progress highlights KORE's position as a prominent IoT hyperscaler. The news was disclosed from Atlanta on March 30, 2026.

data.title: Alamos Gold Stock, Argan, Diversified Energy, 23 Others Join IBD Watchlists As Market Lags
data.description: A total of 26 top-rated growth stocks have recently been included in the IBD 50, IBD Big Cap 20, Sector Leaders, Stock Spotlight, and IPO Leaders lists. These new additions include companies like Alamos Gold Stock, Argan, Diversified Energy, and 23 others. This update comes amidst a market performance that is trailing expectations.

data.title: Massage Envy Announces Scholarship Sweepstakes Winners
data.description: Five individuals have been awarded a $2,500 scholarship each to enroll in a massage school of their choice in Scottsdale, Arizona. The announcement was made by Massage Envy, a prominent provider of massage services and skin care products, known for its extensive franchise network. These scholarships were awarded to the winners of the February competition.

data.title: A Universities Space Research Association (USRA)-Led Study Links Great Salt Lake Desiccation to Worsening Air Quality and Rising Mental Health Burden
data.description: Utah is working diligently to replenish the lake before the 2034 Winter Olympics, with new studies linking reduced water levels to increased particulate exposure and a rise in major depressive episodes in nearby communities. Research has indicated a concerning trend stemming from the shrinking Great Salt Lake in Utah. This study, released on March 30, 2026, highlights the urgency of the situation in Utah as authorities strive to address the issue. The intricate connection between the lake's water levels, particulate matter exposure, and mental health concerns in neighboring areas underscores the need for swift action. Ahead of the 2034 Winter Olympics, the effort to restore the lake is of paramount importance to safeguard the well-being of the communities in the region.

data.title: Siebert Reports 2025 Financial Results
data.description: Siebert Financial Corp. (NASDAQ: SIEB), a company offering various financial services, releases its financial results for the full year ending on December 31, 2025.
Versigent Set to Join S&P SmallCap 600

data.title: Veterans United Home Loans Hosts National Welcome Home Celebration Honoring Vietnam Veterans
data.description: On March 30, 2026, in Washington, a significant event unfolded on the National Mall with Veterans United Home Loans organizing a long-awaited homecoming commemorating National Vietnam War Veterans Day. Over 3,000 individuals attended this grand celebration, marking a poignant moment for the veterans and their families.

data.title: HIGH VIBE WOMEN SELLS 100+ OCTOBER EVENT TICKETS IN TWO WEEKS AS DEMAND GROWS FOR WOMEN'S BUSINESS COMMUNITIES ACROSS CANADA
data.description: Ticket sales for an upcoming Fall event by High Vibe Women are on the rise, reflecting a growing trend towards purposeful, community-oriented environments for female entrepreneurs nationwide. Set to occur on October 22, 2026, at Liuna Station in Hamilton, the event signifies a shift towards empowering women in business.

data.title: Versigent Set to Join S&P SmallCap 600
data.description: On March 30, 2026, Versigent plc (NYSE: VGNT) is set to replace Titan International Inc. (NYSE: TWI) in the S&P SmallCap 600 starting April 2. This change was announced by S&P 500 constituent Aptiv plc (NYSE: APTV) as part of the spin-off of Versigent. The transition will take place at the opening of trading on Thursday and marks a significant shift in the small-cap index composition. This move reflects the strategic decisions within the companies involved and is expected to impact their market performance.
